user.title: Wildfire Monitor
user.description: Choose the area to monitor for active California wildfires. The map is centred on your Home Assistant home; drag the marker and adjust the radius to set how far out fires should be tracked.

abort.already_configured: An area with these coordinates is already configured.

init.title: Wildfire Monitor options
init.description: Tune when the close-to-home alert (binary_sensor.wildfire_alert) trips and how often CAL FIRE is polled.

data.alert_min_acres: Minimum fire size to alert on (acres)
